UpdateBlbHttpListener.listenerPort: Port of the listener to update, must be an integer between 1 and 65535
UpdateBlbHttpListener.backendPort: Listening port of the backend server, must be an integer between 1 and 65535
UpdateBlbHttpListener.scheduler: Load balancing algorithm, supports two modes: "RoundRobin" for weighted round-robin and "LeastConnection" for least connections
UpdateBlbHttpListener.keepSession: Whether to enable session persistence so that requests from the same client are always routed to the same backend server; disabled by default
UpdateBlbHttpListener.keepSessionType: Cookie handling mode for session persistence, effective only when session persistence is enabled; supports "insert" or "rewrite", defaults to "insert"
UpdateBlbHttpListener.keepSessionDuration: Cookie expiration time for session persistence (in seconds), effective only when session persistence is enabled; defaults to 3600s, must be an integer between 1 and 15552000
UpdateBlbHttpListener.keepSessionCookieName: Cookie name to be overwritten for session persistence, effective only when session persistence is enabled and keepSessionType is "rewrite"
UpdateBlbHttpListener.xForwardFor: Whether to enable retrieval of the real client IP; when enabled, the backend server can obtain the client's real IP address via the X-Forwarded-For HTTP header; disabled by default
UpdateBlbHttpListener.xForwardedProto: Forwards the protocol used by the listener to the backend server via the x-forwarded-proto HTTP header
UpdateBlbHttpListener.additionalAttributes: Custom configuration for HTTP type listeners
UpdateBlbHttpListener.additionalAttributes.gzipJson: Whether to enable gzip JSON compression; string type, accepts "on" or "off"
UpdateBlbHttpListener.healthCheckPort: Health check port, defaults to backendPort
UpdateBlbHttpListener.healthCheckURI: Health check URI, defaults to /; takes effect when the health check protocol is "HTTP"
UpdateBlbHttpListener.healthCheckTimeoutInSecond: Health check timeout (in seconds), defaults to 3, must be an integer between 1 and 60
UpdateBlbHttpListener.healthCheckInterval: Health check interval (in seconds), defaults to 3, must be an integer between 1 and 10
UpdateBlbHttpListener.unhealthyThreshold: Unhealthy threshold; number of consecutive health check failures after which the backend server is blocked; defaults to 3, must be an integer between 2 and 5
UpdateBlbHttpListener.healthyThreshold: Healthy threshold; number of consecutive health check successes after which the backend server is restored to available; defaults to 3, must be an integer between 2 and 5
UpdateBlbHttpListener.healthCheckNormalStatus: HTTP status codes considered healthy during health checks; supports combinations of 5 status code classes, e.g. "http_1xx\|http_2xx"; defaults to "http_2xx\|http_3xx"; takes effect when the health check protocol is "HTTP"
UpdateBlbHttpListener.healthCheckHost: Host field carried in the header of layer-7 health check requests, e.g. "localhost"; defaults to ""; takes effect when the health check protocol is "HTTP"
UpdateBlbHttpListener.serverTimeout: Maximum timeout for backend servers (in seconds), defaults to 30s, must be an integer between 1 and 3600
UpdateBlbHttpListener.redirectPort: Forwards requests received by this listener to an HTTPS listener identified by this port
